meta.description: The premier esports community and organizer in Cyprus. Join tournaments, read news, and connect with other gamers.

hero.title: Gamers United
hero.subtitle: Cyprus Biggest Community
hero.description: The house of gaming in Cyprus. Join the fastest growing gaming community, catch the latest news, and grab exclusive merch.

features.title: Tournaments
features.description: Compete in structured leagues and single-day events.

features.title: Community
features.description: Connect with teams, groups, and find local gamers.

features.title: Daily News
features.description: Don't miss the ultimate esports, tech & gaming updates.

features.title: Official Merch
features.description: Rep your club. Buy high quality gaming apparel.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Gamers United is the island's premier esports community, bringing players together through tournaments, events, and a shared passion for competitive gaming.
about.mission: We exist to cultivate a strong, inclusive gaming community in Cyprus. Whether you're a casual player or a competitive esports athlete, Gamers United provides the platform, the events, and the network to level up your experience. We organize tournaments across multiple titles, host community events, and provide a central hub for gaming culture on the island.

pillars.title: Tournaments
pillars.description: From weekly online cups to major LAN events, we run competitive circuits across the most popular esports titles.

pillars.title: Community Events
pillars.description: Game nights, watch parties, meetups, and more. We bring the community together both online and offline.

pillars.title: Content & News
pillars.description: Stay updated with the latest esports news, tournament results, and gaming content from Cyprus and beyond.

community.title: Our Community
community.description: Join thousands of gamers across Cyprus. Find your squad, compete in tournaments, and be part of something bigger.

discord.title: Join Our Discord
discord.description: Our Discord server is the heart of the community. Chat with fellow gamers, find teammates, get tournament updates, and hang out in voice channels.

features.title: Find Your Team
features.description: Looking for teammates? Use our LFG channels to connect with players at your skill level.

features.title: Compete & Win
features.description: Participate in weekly tournaments and seasonal leagues with prizes and recognition.

features.title: Game Nights
features.description: Join casual game nights every week. No pressure, just fun with the community.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: Have a question, partnership proposal, or just want to say hi? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.discordNote: The fastest way to reach us is through our Discord server.
contact.partnerships: Interested in partnering with Gamers United? We're always open to collaborations with brands, organizations, and event organizers. Reach out via email for business inquiries.

news.title: Latest News
news.description: Stay updated with the latest from Gamers United — tournaments, events, and community updates.

shop.title: E-Shop
shop.description: Official Gamers United merchandise. Rep your community with premium gaming apparel and accessories.

footer.tagline: The premier esports and gaming community in Cyprus. Uniting players of all levels.
